query.original: runtime-backed API review evidence best practices

results.description: Use automated discovery tools: capture live traffic, scan repositories and configs, analyze gateway logs, and trace runtime behavior. These methods surface shadow and zombie APIs faster than manual reviews.

meta_url.path: › home  › blog  › api audit checklist – a comprehensive guide for security leaders

results.title: API Audit Checklist 2025 | Secure Your APIs, Ensure Compliance & Stop Breaches

results.description: DAST (Dynamic Application Security Testing): Test running APIs like an attacker would, identifying runtime vulnerabilities like authentication bypasses, injection flaws, and misconfigurations. SAST (Static Application Security Testing): Scan source code without running it to find security issues like hardcoded credentials, unsafe functions, and vulnerable patterns. SCA (Software Composition Analysis): Check dependencies for known vulnerabilities (covered in Practice #8).

meta_url.path: › stackhawk, inc.  › api security testing  › api security best practices: 11 ways to secure your apis

results.title: API Security Best Practices: 11 Essential Strategies to Protect Your APIs

results.description: Additionally, performing an architecture review of the API – looking at the overall design for any security weaknesses (like data flowing through unnecessary intermediaries, or lack of error handling) – can catch issues at a higher level. Runtime Testing and Monitoring: Often overlooked, testing in production (carefully!) is important too.

results.title: API Security: The Complete 2025 Guide

results.description: A breakdown of the leading 8 LLM observability platforms for agent debugging, tracing, and evaluation. ... Error logs tell you what broke. They don't flag hallucinations or when the model drifts from its intended behavior. Basic monitoring catches obvious failures. The harder problem to solve is building workflows where subject matter experts can review specific runs, rate output quality, and add context that engineering teams can act on. The best observability tools turn this feedback into a structured process, not scattered Slack alerts and spreadsheets.
results.title: 8 LLM Observability Tools to Monitor & Evaluate AI Agents

results.description: In the case of an AI agent, given its non-deterministic nature, telemetry is also used as a feedback loop to continuously learn from and improve the quality of the agent by using it as input for evaluation tools. Given that observability and evaluation tools for GenAI come from various vendors, it is important to establish standards around the shape of the telemetry generated by agent apps to avoid lock-in caused by vendor or framework specific formats.
